SPRING | FISH DISHES | DINNER

BAKED SEA BASS WITH LEMON

Servings: 4 | Preparation: 15 minutes | Cooking: 25 minutes

Ingredients:
- 4 whole sea bass (400-500g each)
- 3 lemons
- 4 tablespoons olive oil
- 6 cloves garlic, sliced
- Fresh rosemary and thyme sprigs
- Sea salt and cracked pepper
- 400ml dry white wine
- 200g fingerling potatoes

Instructions:

1. Preheat oven to 200°C.

2. Clean fish thoroughly. Pat dry inside
and outside with paper towels.

3. Place lemon slices and fresh herbs inside
the cavity of each fish.

4. Arrange potatoes in roasting pan. Drizzle
with 2 tablespoons olive oil.

5. Place fish on top of potatoes.

6. Scatter garlic slices around fish.

7. Drizzle remaining oil over fish.

8. Pour white wine around (not over) the fish.

9. Season generously with sea salt and pepper.

10. Bake for 20-25 minutes until fish is
opaque and flakes easily.

11. Serve hot directly from the pan with
lemon wedges on the side.

Perfect with a crisp white wine!
